name: 怪奇帖　～屋上の幽霊と悪魔の儀式～
slug: 怪奇帖-屋上の幽霊と悪魔の儀式
short_description: Maybe nothing happened... Or maybe something did. A fleeting moment from an ordinary high school day. A exploration horror game set in a school at night.
detailed_description:
Estimated Playtime: Around 1 hour

Genre: Short Exploration Horror Adventure

Explore a school at night in this exploration horror adventure.
Take control of a young girl, the protagonist, and guide her through the unfolding story.

You are free to act as you wish throughout the game, and the ending will change depending on your choices.
Will you be able to reach the final conclusion?

Story Overview

Four high school students visit their school at night for a test of courage, wandering from classroom to classroom.
They came prepared with ghost stories, ready to enjoy the eerie atmosphere.

Take control of one of the students, Rin Kowaka, and follow the events that unfold.

Maybe nothing happened...
Or maybe something did.

A fleeting moment from an ordinary high school life — or so it seems.

About Streaming & Videos

  • There are no restrictions on video content or live streaming of the game.

  • No permission is required to create content.

  • If possible, please include the game title and Steam store page link in your video description or stream details.
